text: Oh, they must be digging for worms. One got one earlier when Betty got one and she was like running across the yard with it and there were like four chickens chasing her, including the rooster. Nice. Yeah. And it was just like dangling out of her mouth. Hi, Doug. Gina and I were like dying laughing. All I gotta do is go outside and yell at Flynn now if he's doing something I don't like. Stop doing it. He tore Gina's leg up and I kicked the shit out of him.
